title: CosmeticArmours
description: A Mod Adding New CosmeticArmours into Your Minecraft Worlds!
body:
![CosmeticArmours Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8b5339fcfc54f161e08b82c8f67f0b4cf5da22df.png) ![Description Header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/148371050d61742236129eec428808c8fbc2fca8.png) ![Description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a5cdb6b729a95dabfcf530080cc4ae188f75fdf6.png) [![CosmeticWeapons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2ed267910229a584d8dd79a684c9195b37cc09f2.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/cosmeticweapons) ![Screenshots Header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/be0677d1cf0efb140dc37d85a558b76bc369d498.png) ![Screenshots](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1ebea5e4e0eef9031b957e2ad67b1e432fcd97dc_0.webp) ![Guidebook](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0d1f729828e859881e1a3516a19944d29067c5af.png) [![Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/77ca9c119ea4867abce413d3888c7bf2eedf5e58.png)](https://discord.gg/EJvFkNqrBG) ![Update Version](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/435075ba7a6b1b910a3d2da97cfde17ddd0430cb.png) ![1.5.3.0 Update](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2763133b2a5d9c3563c5311eec4dfafd03782018_0.webp) [![BisectHosting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9673fa1d66340014def374ff41d124f7e8d86075.png)](https://www.bisecthosting.com/CosmeticArmours)
~ Plain Text Description ~

CosmeticArmours introduces an assortment of new Armour sets and Accessories into your Minecraft worlds, each Armour piece prioritising aesthetic appeal whilst still maintaining its practicality for survival worlds!

All Armours are fully balanced to reflect the materials used in crafting, ensuring Armour progression remains balanced, whilst still allowing you to show off your unique individuality and style~

Need to know how to craft something? Everything added by this mod is in the guidebook!

Feel free to join our Discord to submit your ideas!
